chosen.theme: AI Capital Markets Integration — Anthropic Wall Street JV Exploration Signals Frontier Model Pivot to Finance as Federal Exclusion Redirects Commercial Strategy
chosen.news_one_liner: Google Cloud and Genpact's agentic AI deal for CFO offices extends AI-finance integration into enterprise operations, threatening SAP and Oracle while boosting GOOGL cloud revenue durability.

candidates.theme: Apple AI Product Litigation — Siri $250M Settlement Establishes Legal Precedent for AI Feature Misrepresentation Across Big Tech
candidates.news_one_liner: Apple's $250M Siri settlement creates a litigation blueprint threatening all big tech AI feature marketing claims, raising compliance costs sector-wide.
